data/maps/Route113/text.inc.Route113_Text_16FF7F: Wahahaha! Today's technology is a\nwondrous thing!\pTake this volcanic ash here.\nIt can be fashioned into glass.
data/maps/Route113/text.inc.Route113_Text_16FFEE: It's fun walking through the volcano's\nashes on the ground and grass.\pYou can see where you walked - it's\nreally neat!
data/maps/Route113/text.inc.Route113_Text_170096: TRAINER TIPS\pYou may register one of the KEY ITEMS\nin your BAG as SELECT.\pSimply press SELECT to use the\nregistered item conveniently.
data/maps/Route113/text.inc.Route113_Text_17011D: GLASS WORKSHOP\n“Turning Volcanic Ash into Glass Items”
